\boxed{A} Based on the evidence, liraglutide is explicitly described as a member of the GLP-1 analogue class, whose pharmacological actions include "promoting satiety," "slowing gastric emptying," and "appetite suppression." Multiple references confirm that liraglutide is included in fixed-dose combination products specifically designed for diabetes management where its role extends beyond glucose regulation to contribute to weight management due to its impact on appetite and satiety. Therefore, liraglutide has demonstrated effectiveness in weight reduction.
\boxed{A}
